updates.text: A reminder to ensure you only rely on trusted sources for legal advice. There has been a recent spate of ostensibly AI generated articles claiming that various new criminal and traffic laws came into effect in November. These articles claim that the new laws require people to keep their headlights on at all times while driving, as well as a number of other patently fabricated laws. You can read more about it below: https://lnkd.in/gJtNtCT3

results.about: Sydney Criminal Lawyers® is a multi-award winning, Sydney City law firm practising exclusively in criminal and traffic cases. Our outstanding team of experienced lawyers works closely with our support staff to consistently deliver exceptional results for our clients. Our team has a proven track record of: • Getting criminal cases dropped at an early stage, • Winning Local Court hearings, • Winning complex District and Supreme Court trials, • Winning Appeals in all jurisdictions, and • Helping clients avoid criminal convictions if they plead guilty. We were the first firm to publish 'fixed-fees' in criminal cases (2004) and have introduced many other innovations to the profession. We believe our innovations have helped the community by: • Promoting transparency in legal costs; • Increasing access to legal information,and • Setting quality standards. We have won dozens of awards over the years, including Criminal Defence Firm of the Year in Australia from several reputable professional and business organisations.
results.specialties: Serious Crime, Traffic Offences, Drug Offences, Drink Driving Offences, Fraud, Drug Driving, Assault, Negligent Driving, AVO, Drive while Suspended / Disqualified, Bail Applications, Habitual Traffic Offender, Section 10 Dismissals, and Driver Licence Appeals

results.description:
Sydney Criminal Lawyers® | 3,250 followers on LinkedIn. Australia's Most Awarded Criminal Law Firm | Sydney Criminal Lawyers® is a multi-award winning, Sydney City law firm practising exclusively in criminal and traffic cases.

Our outstanding team of experienced lawyers works closely with our support staff to consistently deliver exceptional results for our clients.

Our team has a proven track record of:

• Getting criminal cases dropped at an early stage,
• Winning Local Court hearings,
• Winning complex District and Supreme Court trials, 
• Winning Appeals in all jurisdictions, and
• Helping clients avoid criminal convictions if they plead guilty.
results.unformatted_about:
Sydney Criminal Lawyers® is a multi-award winning, Sydney City law firm practising exclusively in criminal and traffic cases.

Our outstanding team of experienced lawyers works closely with our support staff to consistently deliver exceptional results for our clients.

Our team has a proven track record of:

• Getting criminal cases dropped at an early stage,
• Winning Local Court hearings,
• Winning complex District and Supreme Court trials, 
• Winning Appeals in all jurisdictions, and
• Helping clients avoid criminal convictions if they plead guilty.

We were the first firm to publish 'fixed-fees' in criminal cases (2004) and have introduced many other innovations to the profession.

We believe our innovations have helped the community by: 

• Promoting transparency in legal costs;
• Increasing access to legal information,and
• Setting quality standards.

We have won dozens of awards over the years, including Criminal Defence Firm of the Year in Australia from several reputable professional and business organisations.
